name: Chinese Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour 2 cups hot water over the mushrooms in a bowl and soak for 15 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, put 10 cups water into a large soup pot.
3. Add tamari, sherry, ginger, and garlic to the water. Bring to a boil.
4. Add onion wedges. Reduce heat.
5. Squeeze excess liquid from the mushrooms, reserving the liquid.
6. Add 1 1/2 cups of the reserved mushroom liquid to the hot broth.
7. Chop the mushrooms, discarding tough stems, and add them to the broth.
8. Add the remaining ingredients (except noodles) to the soup.
9. Simmer over low heat for 15 minutes.
10. Add the noodles and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
11. Serve hot.
Helpful Hints: This recipe serves four people or can be doubled to serve eight, making it a great first course with other Chinese dishes.
